requirement: Pedestrian detection rate shall be >= 0.95 in all lighting conditions including night and rain
False positive rate for vehicle detection shall be <= 0.05 on highway scenarios
Pedestrian detection latency shall be <= 50ms at 95th percentile
Overall mAP on standard ADAS benchmark shall be >= 0.82
Model inference time shall be <= 25ms on target hardware TDA4VM
Perception module output format shall conform to AveraPerceptionOutput v2 schema
